nodes.title: Model Loader Note
widgets_values: ↓ Select your own models in this subgraph ↓

nodes.title: LTX Sequencer Note
widgets_values:
Use one image at full strength for regular image to video.

If frame_insert is -1, it will be inserted at the last frame.

The insert_mode allows to switch between inserting images by setting the exact frame or by setting the exact second.

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I set the length of the video?**

You can set the length of the video in the Model Loader Subgraph →

**I keep getting errors when running this workflow!**

Double check that all of the correct models loaded. This is using the newest version of 2x upscaler (v1.1). You can change it to the older one under the Model Loader.

**Where do I download these models??**

There is a good list of models and download links here: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Also the latest v1.1 spatial upscaler can be found here: <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main>

The tiny vae (taeltx2_3.safetensors) is found here:
<https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>

**I want to use my own models!**

You can change the models in the Model Loader Subgraph →

nodes.title: Custom Audio Note
widgets_values:
↑ Load Custom Audio Here ↑

(Make sure to set use custom audio to true to enable it)

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I set the length of the video?**

You can set the length of the video in the Model Loader Subgraph →

**I keep getting errors when running this workflow!**

Double check that all of the correct models loaded. This is using the newest version of 2x upscaler (v1.1). You can change it to the older one under the Model Loader.

**Where do I download these models??**

There is a good list of models and download links here: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Also the latest v1.1 spatial upscaler can be found here: <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main>

The tiny vae (taeltx2_3.safetensors) is found here:
<https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>

**I want to use my own models!**

You can change the models in the Model Loader Subgraph →

nodes.title: 🔤 CR Text Part1
widgets_values:
second 1: The human warrior and the beast-warrior walk forward in perfect sync. Their heavy steps kick up small clouds of dust from the ground. The camera is stable, low-angle shot.

second 2: Dust clouds gets bigger. Their walk continues, uninterrupted.

second 3: Dust clouds get even bigger.Slight zooum out.

second 4: Dust clouds start to become normal again, like they were at the beginning. Their walk remains constant and powerful. The camera zooms out in order to center the two characters.

second 5: They continue their powerful, synchronized walk forward. The scene ends with their full body visible, while walking.

nodes.title: Flag Descriptions
widgets_values:
A vertical tricolor flag with three equal stripes: black (left), red (center), and green (right). Centered in the middle (overlapping the red band) is the national emblem in white, featuring a mosque with a mihrab (prayer niche) and minbar (pulpit) inside, flanked by two flags. The mosque is encircled by sheaves of wheat, with the Shahada (Islamic creed) written in Arabic at the top and the year "1298" (Solar Hijri calendar) in Arabic numerals at the bottom.
A solid red field. In the absolute center is a black, silhouetted, two-headed eagle with its wings spread.
A flag divided vertically into two equal halves: green (left side) and white (right side). In the exact center of the flag (spanning both halves) is a red crescent moon, with a small red five-pointed star nestled within the crescent's opening.
A vertical tricolor with three stripes: blue (left), yellow (center), and red (right). The central yellow stripe is slightly wider than the other two. In the center of the yellow stripe is the coat of arms of Andorra.
A flag with two horizontal stripes of equal size: red (top) and black (bottom). In the exact center is a yellow emblem consisting of a five-pointed star, half of a cogwheel, and a machete, which are arranged to resemble a hammer and sickle.
A red field. In the center is a large, inverted triangle pointing downwards. The triangle has three horizontal bands: black (top), blue (middle), and white (bottom). A yellow 16-pointed sun is rising from the top edge of the blue band into the black band.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: light blue (top), white (middle), and light blue (bottom). In the center of the white stripe is the "Sun of May," a yellow sun with 32 alternating straight and wavy rays.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), blue (middle), and orange (bottom).
A blue field. In the upper-left quadrant (the canton) is the Union Jack (the flag of the UK). Directly below the Union Jack is a large, white, seven-pointed star (the Commonwealth Star). The right half of the flag (the fly) displays five white stars arranged in the pattern of the Southern Cross constellation (four are seven-pointed, one small star is five-pointed).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and red (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: light blue (top), red (middle), and green (bottom). In the center of the red stripe is a white crescent moon and a white eight-pointed star.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: aquamarine (top), yellow (middle), and aquamarine (bottom). On the left side (the hoist) is a black equilateral triangle pointing to the right, which covers the full height of the flag.
A white band on the left side (hoist) and a red band on the right. The two bands are separated by a serrated (zigzag) line with five white triangles that point to the right (into the red area).
A solid green field. In the center is a large red circle (a disc). The disc is offset slightly towards the left (hoist) side, not in the geometric center.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: ultramarine blue (left), yellow (center), and ultramarine blue (right). In the center of the yellow stripe is the black silhouette of a trident head.
A flag with two horizontal stripes: red (top, covering 2/3 of the height) and green (bottom, covering 1/3 of the height). On the left side (hoist) is a white vertical stripe decorated with a red ornamental pattern (a traditional ruchnik design).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: black (left/hoist side), yellow (center), and red (right/fly side).
A royal blue field. There are two thin, horizontal red stripes, one at the very top and one at the very bottom. In the center of the blue field is a large white circle containing the national coat of arms.
A flag with two horizontal stripes of equal size on the right side: yellow (top) and red (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a single vertical green stripe that takes up about 1/3 of the flag's width.
A rectangular flag divided diagonally from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner, creating two triangles. The top triangle is yellow, and the bottom triangle is orange. Centered along the diagonal line is a large white "Druk" (Thunder Dragon) holding jewels.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), yellow (middle), and green (bottom). (Note: The state flag has the coat of arms in the center, but the civil flag does not).
A blue field. On the right side is a large yellow right-angled triangle, with its hypotenuse running from the top-center to the bottom-right. Along the hypotenuse, inside the blue field, is a line of nine white five-pointed stars (the top and bottom stars are cut in half).
A light blue field. In the center is a single horizontal stripe that is black, with a thin white border (fimbriation) above and below the black stripe.
A green field. In the center is a large yellow rhombus (diamond shape). Inside the rhombus is a blue circle (a celestial globe) depicting a starry sky with 27 white stars. The circle is crossed by a curved white banner with the motto "ORDEM E PROGRESSO" (Order and Progress) in green letters.
A yellow field. It is crossed diagonally from top-left to bottom-right by two stripes: one white (top) and one black (bottom). In the center of the flag is the national emblem in red.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: white (top), green (middle), and red (bottom).
A flag with two horizontal stripes of equal size: red (top) and green (bottom). In the exact center of the flag is a single yellow five-pointed star.
A white saltire (a diagonal cross) divides the flag into four triangles. The top and bottom triangles are red; the left and right triangles are green. In the very center is a white circle containing three red six-pointed stars, arranged in a triangle (one on top, two on the bottom).
Three horizontal stripes. The top and bottom stripes are blue and of equal size. The middle stripe is red and is double the width of the blue stripes. Centered on the red stripe is a white depiction of the Angkor Wat temple complex.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), red (center), and yellow (right). In the exact center of the red stripe is a single yellow five-pointed star.
A vertical tricolor with three stripes: red (left), white (center), and red (right). The central white stripe is double the width of the two red stripes. In the center of the white stripe is a large, red, 11-pointed maple leaf.
A blue field. In the lower half, there are three thin horizontal stripes: white (top), red (middle), white (bottom). In the lower-left quarter is a circle of ten yellow five-pointed stars.
Four equal horizontal stripes: blue (top), white, green, yellow (bottom). A single, vertical red stripe of the same width runs down the exact center, crossing all four horizontal stripes. A single yellow five-pointed star is in the top-left corner (in the blue stripe).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (left), yellow (center), and red (right).
Two equal horizontal stripes: white (top) and red (bottom). In the top-left corner (the canton) is a blue square (the same height as the white stripe) containing a single, large white five-pointed star in its center.
A solid red field. In the top-left corner (canton) is one large yellow five-pointed star. To its right, four smaller yellow five-pointed stars are arranged in a vertical arc, with each small star pointing one tip towards the center of the large star.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top stripe is yellow and takes up the top half (1/2) of the flag. The bottom half is split into two equal stripes: blue (middle) and red (bottom).
Four equal horizontal stripes: yellow (top), white, red, blue (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a green triangle pointing to the right. Inside the triangle is a white crescent moon (pointing right) and four white five-pointed stars arranged in a vertical line between the crescent's tips.
Five horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: blue, white, red, white, blue. The central red stripe is double the width of the other four stripes. The state flag (most common) places the national coat of arms in a white oval on the red stripe, offset towards the left (hoist) side.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: orange (left), white (center), and green (right).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom). In the center of the flag is the national coat of arms: a shield with a red-and-white checkerboard pattern, topped by a crown of five smaller shields.
Five equal horizontal stripes, alternating blue and white (blue, white, blue, white, blue). On the left side (hoist) is a red equilateral triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the red triangle is a single white five-pointed star.
A solid white field. In the center is a copper-orange silhouette map of the island of Cyprus. Directly below the map are two green, crossed olive branches.
Two equal horizontal stripes: white (top) and red (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a blue triangle that extends from the full height of the flag to the horizontal center point.
A green triangle fills the top-left corner. A red triangle fills the bottom-right corner. The two triangles are separated by a wide yellow diagonal stripe running from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner.
A solid red field. It is crossed by a white "Scandinavian cross" (a cross where the vertical bar is offset to the left/hoist side).
Two equal horizontal stripes: light blue (top) and light green (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a white triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the white triangle is a single red five-pointed star.
A solid green field. It is crossed by a tricolor cross (made of three stripes: yellow, black, and white) in both the horizontal and vertical directions. In the center of the cross is a red circle containing a Sisserou parrot (facing left), which is encircled by ten green five-pointed stars.
A large white cross in the center divides the flag into four rectangles. The top-left and bottom-right rectangles are blue. The top-right and bottom-left rectangles are red. The national coat of arms is placed in the center of the white cross.
A red field. On the left side (hoist) is a black triangle pointing to the right, which extends about 2/3 of the way across the flag. This black triangle is superimposed on top of a larger yellow triangle that extends to the horizontal center point. In the center of the black triangle is a single white five-pointed star.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top stripe is yellow and takes up the top half (1/2) of the flag. The bottom half is split into two equal stripes: blue (middle) and red (bottom). In the center of the flag is the national coat of arms.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and black (bottom). In the center of the white stripe is the golden Eagle of Saladin.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom). In the center of the white stripe is the national coat of arms (a triangle with volcanoes, a cap, and a rainbow, surrounded by flags and a wreath).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and red (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a blue triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the white stripe is the national coat of arms (a silk-cotton tree under six yellow stars).
A large red triangle starts from the left side (hoist) and extends to the far-right point, dividing the flag into two outer triangles: green (top) and blue (bottom). In the center of the red triangle (on the hoist side) is a yellow emblem of an olive wreath encircling an olive branch.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), black (middle), and white (bottom).
Five horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: blue, yellow, crimson red, yellow, blue. The central red stripe is much wider than the others. In the center of the red stripe is a large, traditional Nguni shield (oriented horizontally, black and white) with two spears and a lusekwane (staff) decorated with injobo (tassels).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), yellow (middle), and red (bottom). In the exact center of the flag is a blue circle (a disc) containing a yellow "pentagram" (a five-pointed star with lines connecting the vertices) that emits five yellow rays.
A light blue field. In the upper-left quadrant (the canton) is the Union Jack (the flag of the UK). On the right half of the flag (the fly) is the shield from the national coat of arms (a white shield with a red cross and a red band at the top, containing a lion and various crops).
A solid white field. It is crossed by a blue "Scandinavian cross" (a cross where the vertical bar is offset to the left/hoist side).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (left/hoist side), white (center), and red (right/fly side).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), yellow (middle), and blue (bottom).
Five horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: red, white, blue, white, red. The central blue stripe is wider than the red stripes, and the two white stripes are very thin (fimbriations) that separate the other three.
A solid white field. In the center is a large red cross (the St. George's cross) that divides the flag into four white squares. In the center of each of the four white squares is a small red "Bolnisi cross" (a cross with flared arms, similar to a Cross Pattée).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: black (top), red (middle), and gold/yellow (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), yellow (middle), and green (bottom). In the exact center of the yellow stripe is a large, black five-pointed star.
Nine equal horizontal stripes alternating blue and white, starting with a blue stripe at the top. In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a blue square containing a white cross.
A red border surrounds the entire flag. Inside this border, the main field is divided by two diagonal lines into four triangles: yellow (top), yellow (bottom), green (left), and green (right). In the center is a red circle containing a yellow five-pointed star. There are three yellow stars on the top red border, three on the bottom border, and one symbol of a nutmeg in the left green triangle.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: sky blue (left), white (center), and sky blue (right). In the center of the white stripe is the national coat of arms (a Quetzal bird on a scroll, with crossed rifles and swords).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: red (left), yellow (center), and green (right).
A vertical red stripe on the left side (hoist), taking up 1/3 of the flag's width. The right 2/3 of the flag is split into two equal horizontal stripes: yellow (top) and green (bottom). In the center of the red stripe is a single black five-pointed star.
A green field. A white-bordered, wide red triangle (an arrowhead shape) starts from the full hoist (left side) and points to the right. This red triangle is superimposed on a black-bordered, wider yellow triangle, which also starts from the hoist and points to the right.
Two equal horizontal stripes: blue (top) and red (bottom). The state flag (most common) features a white rectangle in the center which contains the national coat of arms (a palm tree with cannons, flags, and drums).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom). In the center of the white stripe are five blue five-pointed stars, arranged in an "X" pattern (one in the center, and four in a rectangle around it).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and green (bottom).
A solid blue field. It is crossed by a white "Scandinavian cross." Inside the white cross is a narrower red "Scandinavian cross" (the vertical bar of the cross is offset to the left/hoist side).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: saffron/orange (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). In the exact center of the white stripe is a navy blue "Ashoka Chakra," which is a 24-spoke wheel.
Two equal horizontal stripes: red (top) and white (bottom). (Note: This is visually identical to the flag of Monaco, but proportions may differ).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and red (bottom). The white stripe has stylized Kufic script in white (saying "Allahu Akbar") repeated along its bottom edge (bordering the red) and top edge (bordering the green). In the center of the white stripe is the national emblem in red (a stylized tulip/word "Allah").
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and black (bottom). In the center of the white stripe, the phrase "Allahu Akbar" (God is the Greatest) is written in green Kufic script.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), white (center), and orange (right).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left/hoist side), white (center), and red (right/fly side).
A large, yellow saltire (a diagonal cross) divides the flag into four triangles. The top and bottom triangles are green. The left (hoist) and right (fly) triangles are black.
A solid white field. In the exact center is a large red circle (a disc), representing the sun.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: black (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a red triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the red triangle is a small, white seven-pointed star.
A solid sky-blue field. In the center is a yellow sun with 32 rays, and flying beneath the sun is a yellow silhouette of a Steppe eagle. On the left side (hoist) is a vertical yellow stripe featuring the national ornamental pattern (koshkar-muiz, "the horns of the ram").
A horizontal tricolor of black (top), red (middle), and green (bottom). The central red stripe is bordered above and below by thin white stripes (fimbriations). In the center of the flag is a large, traditional Maasai warrior shield (red, black, and white) with two white crossed spears behind it.
The top half is red, and the bottom half is composed of six wavy, alternating stripes of blue and white (representing the ocean). A yellow frigatebird is shown flying in the red section, above a yellow rising sun (17 rays) that emerges from the water.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and red (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a black trapezoid pointing to the right, which takes up 1/3 of the flag's width.
A solid red field. In the center is a yellow sun with 40 evenly spaced rays. In the center of the sun is a red depiction of the "tunduk," the circular crown of a traditional Kyrgyz yurt, crossed by three intersecting lines.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are red and of equal size. The middle stripe is blue and is double the width of the red stripes. In the exact center of the blue stripe is a large white circle (a disc).
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are maroon/dark red. The middle stripe is white. The two red stripes are double the width of the central white stripe (ratio 2:1:2).
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are red and of equal size. The middle stripe is white and is double the width of the red stripes. In the center of the white stripe is a large, green silhouette of a Cedar tree.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). In the center of the white stripe is a black "Mokorotlo," a traditional Basotho straw hat.
Eleven equal horizontal stripes alternating red and white (starting with red at the top). In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a blue square (covering the top five stripes) containing a single, large white five-pointed star in its center.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are red (top) and green (bottom) and are of equal size. The middle stripe is black and is double the width of the other two. In the center of the black stripe is a white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star.
Two equal horizontal stripes: blue (top) and red (bottom). In the top-left corner (in the blue stripe) is a golden/yellow princely crown.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: yellow (top), green (middle), and red (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and light blue (bottom).
A flag divided into three parts. On the left side (hoist) is a single vertical white stripe (taking up 1/3 of the width). The right 2/3 of the flag is split into two equal horizontal stripes: red (top) and green (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: black (top), red (middle), and green (bottom). In the center of the black stripe is a red rising sun with 31 rays.
14 equal horizontal stripes alternating red and white (starting with red at the top). In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a blue rectangle containing a yellow crescent moon and a yellow 14-pointed star.
A solid red field. In the center is a large green rectangle. In the center of the green rectangle is a white vertical crescent moon (with the opening facing the right/fly side).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), yellow (center), and red (right).
A flag divided vertically into two equal halves: white (left side) and red (right side). In the top-flew corner (in the white section) is a George Cross medal (a grey cross with a red center depicting St. George and the Dragon), bordered in red.
A blue field. Two diagonal stripes (expanding from thin on the left to wide on the right) cross the flag from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner: orange (top stripe) and white (bottom stripe). In the upper-left corner (canton) is a white 24-pointed star, which has four main points (top, bottom, left, right) that are much longer than the other 20 points.
A green field with a thin red stripe at the very top and a thin red stripe at the very bottom. In the center of the green field is a golden/yellow horizontal crescent moon (opening upwards) with a golden/yellow five-pointed star above it.
A horizontal "quadricolor" with four equal stripes: red (top), blue, yellow, and green (bottom).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), white (center), and red (right). In the center of the white stripe is the national coat of arms (an eagle perched on a cactus, devouring a snake).
A light blue field. In the center are four white five-pointed stars, arranged in a diamond (or "compass points") pattern.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (left), yellow (center), and red (right). In the center of the yellow stripe is the national coat of arms (a dark eagle holding a shield with an aurochs head).
Two equal horizontal stripes: red (top) and white (bottom). (Note: This is visually identical to the flag of Indonesia, but proportions are different).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: red (left), blue (center), and red (right). On the left-most red stripe is the yellow "Soyombo" symbol (a complex emblem including fire, sun, moon, triangles, and yin-yang).
A red field with a golden/yellow border. In the center is the national coat of arms (a golden two-headed eagle holding a scepter and orb, with a lion on its chest shield).
A solid red field. In the center is a green "pentagram" (a five-pointed star, outlined).
Five horizontal stripes: green (top), white, black, white, red (bottom). The central black stripe is wider than the green and red, and the white stripes are thin fimbriations. On the left side (hoist) is a red triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the triangle is a yellow five-pointed star, upon which is an open white book, and crossed on top of that are a black AK-47 rifle and a black hoe.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: yellow (top), green (middle), and red (bottom). In the exact center of the flag is a single, large white five-pointed star.
A blue triangle (top left) and a green triangle (bottom right) are separated by a wide red diagonal stripe (bordered by thin white stripes) running from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner. In the top-left blue triangle is a yellow 12-pointed sun.
A blue field. In the center is a single, thin, horizontal yellow stripe. Below this stripe, on the left (hoist) side, is a large white 12-pointed star.
The only non-rectangular national flag in the world. It is shaped like two stacked, crimson red triangles (pennants) pointing right. The entire flag has a blue border. The top triangle contains a white crescent moon with a star inside. The bottom triangle contains a white 12-pointed sun.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom).
A blue field. In the upper-left quadrant (the canton) is the Union Jack (the flag of the UK). The right half of the flag (the fly) displays four red five-pointed stars, each outlined in white, arranged in the pattern of the Southern Cross constellation.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom). In the center of the white stripe is the national coat of arms (a triangle with volcanoes, a cap, and a rainbow, surrounded by the words "REPUBLICA DE NICARAGUA - AMERICA CENTRAL").
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: orange (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). In the exact center of the white stripe is a large orange circle (a disc).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), white (center), and green (right).
A wide red stripe in the center, bordered above and below by thin white stripes, which are themselves bordered by blue stripes at the top and bottom. On the left side (hoist) of the red stripe is a white circle containing a red five-pointed star.
A solid red field. In the center is a yellow sun with eight broad yellow rays extending to the edges of the flag.
A solid red field. It is crossed by a white "Scandinavian cross." Inside the white cross is a narrower blue "Scandinavian cross" (the vertical bar of the cross is offset to the left/hoist side).
A red field. On the left side (hoist) is a vertical white stripe (top), a vertical red stripe (middle, containing the national emblem in white), and a vertical green stripe (bottom). [Correction: More accurately] A horizontal tricolor of white (top), red (middle), and green (bottom). On the left (hoist) side, a vertical red bar contains the national emblem (two crossed swords, a dagger, and belt) in white.
A dark green field. On the left side (hoist) is a vertical white stripe (taking up 1/4 of the width). In the center of the green field is a large white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star. The crescent opening and star are tilted towards the top-right corner.
A light blue field. In the center is a large yellow circle (a disc). The disc is offset slightly towards the left (hoist) side, not in the geometric center.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: black (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a red triangle pointing to the right.
Divided into four equal quarters (a 2x2 grid). Top-left quarter is white with a blue five-pointed star. Top-right quarter is solid red. Bottom-left quarter is solid blue. Bottom-right quarter is white with a red five-pointed star.
Divided diagonally from the top-left corner to the bottom-right corner. The top triangle is red, containing a yellow silhouette of a Raggiana bird-of-paradise. The bottom triangle is black, containing five white stars arranged in the pattern of the Southern Cross constellation.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom). This flag is unique because it has different emblems on the front (obverse) and back (reverse). The front (obverse) side has the national coat of arms in the center. The back (reverse) side has the Treasury Seal in the center.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: red (left), white (center), and red (right). The state flag includes the national coat of arms in the center.
Two equal horizontal stripes: blue (top) and red (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a white equilateral triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the triangle is a yellow sun with eight primary rays. In each corner of the triangle is a small yellow five-pointed star.
Two equal horizontal stripes: white (top) and red (bottom).
A flag divided vertically (offset to the left). The left portion (2/5 of the width) is green. The right portion (3/5 of the width) is red. Centered on the dividing line is the national coat of arms (an armillary sphere with a traditional Portuguese shield).
A white band on the left side (hoist) and a maroon/purple-red band on the right. The two bands are separated by a serrated (zigzag) line with nine white triangles that point to the right (into the maroon area).
A sky-blue field. A single red diagonal stripe, bordered on both sides by a thin yellow stripe, runs from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner. A single yellow five-pointed star is in the top-left corner.
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (left), yellow (center), and red (right).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: white (top), blue (middle), and red (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top stripe is blue and takes up the top half (1/2) of the flag. The bottom half is split into two equal stripes: yellow (middle) and green (bottom). In the upper-right corner (in the blue stripe) is a yellow sun with 24 rays.
A green triangle (top left) and a red triangle (bottom right) are separated by a wide black diagonal stripe (bordered by thin yellow stripes) running from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner. Two white five-pointed stars are located on the black stripe.
A light blue field. In the center is a large triangle composed of three parts: a white triangle at the bottom, a smaller black triangle (arrowhead) on top of it, and a smaller yellow triangle at the very bottom, all pointing upwards.
A vertical tricolor of blue (left), yellow (center), and green (right). The central yellow stripe is double the width of the other two. In the center of the yellow stripe are three green diamonds, arranged in a "V" shape (for Vincent).
A red field. In the upper-left quadrant (the canton) is a blue rectangle containing five white stars (four large, one small) arranged in the pattern of the Southern Cross constellation.
Two equal horizontal stripes: white (top) and light blue (bottom). The state flag (most common) features the national coat of arms in the center.
A horizontal tricolor of green (top), yellow (middle), and green (bottom). The central yellow stripe is wider than the green stripes. On the left (hoist) side is a red triangle pointing to the right. Two black five-pointed stars are placed horizontally in the yellow stripe.
A solid green field. In the center is the Shahada (Islamic creed) written in large white Thuluth script (Arabic calligraphy). Below the script is a white sword, pointing to the left (hoist side).
A vertical tricolor with three equal stripes: green (left), yellow (center), and red (right). In the exact center of the yellow stripe is a single green five-pointed star.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), blue (middle), and white (bottom). The national coat of arms (a two-headed white eagle with a shield) is placed off-center, towards the left (hoist) side.
Five diagonal bands (like a fan) emerge from the bottom-left corner. From left to right: blue, yellow, red, white, and green.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and blue (bottom).
Two equal horizontal stripes: red (top) and white (bottom). In the upper-left corner (in the red stripe) is a white crescent moon (opening to the right) and five white five-pointed stars arranged in a circle.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: white (top), blue (middle), and red (bottom). The national coat of arms (a white double-cross on a red shield with three blue mountains) is placed off-center, towards the left (hoist) side.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: white (top), blue (middle), and red (bottom). The national coat of arms (a shield with Mount Triglav and three yellow stars) is placed in the upper-left, centered between the white and blue stripes.
A blue triangle (top left) and a green triangle (bottom right) are separated by a thin yellow diagonal stripe running from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner. In the top-left blue triangle are five white five-pointed stars, arranged in a pattern.
A light blue field. In the exact center is a single, large white five-pointed star.
A complex design. A green "Y" shape (pall) runs horizontally from the left (hoist) side, forks in the middle, and extends to the top-right and bottom-right corners. This "Y" is bordered by white. The triangle on the left is black, bordered by yellow. The area above the "Y" is red. The area below the "Y" is blue.
A solid white field. In the center is the "Taegeuk," a circle divided equally: the top half is red (yang) and the bottom half is blue (yin). In each of the four corners of the flag is a "trigram" (kwae) composed of three parallel lines (some broken, some unbroken), all in black.
A horizontal tricolor of black (top), red (middle), and green (bottom). The central red stripe is bordered above and below by thin white stripes (fimbriations). On the left (hoist) side is a blue triangle pointing to the right. In the center of the blue triangle is a single yellow five-pointed star.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are red and of equal size. The middle stripe is yellow and is double the width of the red stripes. The national coat of arms is placed on the yellow stripe, off-center towards the left (hoist) side.
A yellow border surrounds the entire flag. The right side contains a maroon rectangle with a yellow lion (the Sinha) holding a sword, with a yellow bo leaf in each of the four corners. To the left of this maroon rectangle are two equal-sized vertical stripes: green (left) and saffron/orange (right).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and black (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a green triangle pointing to the right.
Five horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: green, white, red, white, green. The central red stripe is much wider than the others; the green stripes are medium width; the white stripes are thin. In the center of the red stripe is a single, large yellow five-pointed star.
A solid light blue field. It is crossed by a yellow "Scandinavian cross" (a cross where the vertical bar is offset to the left/hoist side).
A solid red field (which is perfectly square). In the exact center is a bold, white equilateral "Greek cross" (a cross where all four arms are of equal length and do not extend to the edges).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and black (bottom). In the center of the white stripe are three red five-pointed stars, arranged in a horizontal line. [Note: This is the flag listed in the image. The current flag of Syria uses two green stars.]
(CHINA) A solid red field. In the top-left corner (canton) is one large yellow five-pointed star. To its right, four smaller yellow five-pointed stars are arranged in a vertical arc, with each small star pointing one tip towards the center of the large star.
A horizontal tricolor with three stripes. The top and bottom stripes are red (top) and green (bottom) and are of equal size. The middle stripe is white and is double the width of the other two. In the center of the white stripe is a golden/yellow emblem: a crown topped by an arc of seven golden/yellow five-pointed stars.
A green triangle (top left) and a blue triangle (bottom right) are separated by a wide black diagonal stripe (bordered by thin yellow stripes) running from the bottom-left corner to the top-right corner.
Five horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: red, white, blue, white, red. The central blue stripe is double the width of the other four stripes.
A red field. On the left side (hoist) is a yellow triangle pointing to the right, which extends to the horizontal center of the flag. Superimposed on the yellow triangle is a smaller black triangle, also pointing to the right. In the center of the black triangle is a single white five-pointed star.
Five equal horizontal stripes alternating green and yellow (green, yellow, green, yellow, green). In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a red square (the same height as the top three stripes) containing a single, large white five-pointed star in its center.
A solid red field. In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a white rectangle containing a red "couped cross" (a cross with arms that do not extend to the edges, like the Swiss cross).
A solid red field. A single, wide black diagonal stripe, bordered on both sides by a thin white stripe (fimbriation), runs from the top-left corner to the bottom-right corner.
A solid red field. In the exact center is a large white circle (a disc). In the center of the white circle is a red crescent moon and a red five-pointed star.
A solid red field. In the center (offset slightly to the left/hoist side) is a white crescent moon (opening to the right) and a white five-pointed star located in the opening of the crescent.
A green field. On the left (hoist) side is a vertical red stripe containing five traditional gül (carpet designs) stacked vertically. To the right of this stripe, in the upper-left of the green field, is a white crescent moon (opening to the top-right) and five white five-pointed stars.
A light blue field. In the upper-left quadrant (the canton) is the Union Jack (the flag of the UK). The right half of the flag (the fly) displays nine yellow five-pointed stars, arranged in the geographic pattern of the islands.
Six equal horizontal stripes. From top to bottom: black, yellow, red, black, yellow, red. In the exact center of the flag is a white circle (a disc) containing the national symbol: a grey crowned crane, facing left.
Two equal horizontal stripes: blue (top) and yellow (bottom).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: green (top), white (middle), and black (bottom). On the left side (hoist) is a single vertical red stripe that takes up 1/4 of the flag's width.
A blue field. It features three superimposed crosses: a red "St. George's Cross" (for England) edged in white; overlaid with a white "St. Andrew's Saltire" (diagonal cross, for Scotland); overlaid with a red "St. Patrick's Saltire" (diagonal cross, for Ireland). This combination is known as the "Union Jack."
13 equal horizontal stripes alternating red and white (starting with red at the top). In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a blue rectangle containing 50 white five-pointed stars, arranged in nine horizontal rows (alternating rows of 6 and 5 stars).
Nine equal horizontal stripes alternating white and blue, starting with a white stripe at the top. In the upper-left corner (the canton) is a white square containing the "Sun of May," a yellow sun with 16 alternating straight and wavy rays.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: blue (top), white (middle), and green (bottom). The central white stripe is bordered above and below by thin red stripes (fimbriations). In the upper-left corner (in the blue stripe) is a white crescent moon (opening to the right) and 12 white five-pointed stars.
A central black horizontal stripe (bordered by thin yellow stripes) splits into a "Y" shape on the left (hoist) side. The area above the "Y" is red; the area below is green. Inside the black triangle on the hoist side is a yellow emblem of a boar's tusk encircling two green namele fern leaves.
A flag divided vertically into two equal halves (the flag is square). The left side is yellow/gold. The right side is white. In the center of the white half are the keys of Saint Peter (one gold, one silver, crossed) and the papal tiara (the coat of arms).
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: yellow (top), blue (middle), and red (bottom). In the center of the blue stripe is an arc of eight white five-pointed stars. The state flag (most common) also has the coat of arms in the top-left corner (in the yellow stripe).
A solid red field. In the exact center is a single, large yellow five-pointed star.
A horizontal tricolor with three equal stripes: red (top), white (middle), and black (bottom).
A green field. In the bottom-right corner (fly) is a vertical tricolor of three stripes: red (left), black (middle), and orange (right). Above these stripes, in the green field, is a copper-orange eagle in flight.
Seven equal horizontal stripes: green, yellow, red, black (center), red, yellow, green. On the left (hoist) side is a white triangle pointing to the right, bordered in black. In the center of the triangle is a red five-pointed star with a yellow Zimbabwe Bird silhouette on top.

nodes.title: Animal-Warrior description
widgets_values:
A powerful, anthropomorphic Snow Leopard warrior with a thick-furred feline head, a muscular bipedal body, and a long, spotted balancing tail.
A noble, anthropomorphic Golden Eagle warrior with a sharp, beaked head, powerful feathered arms ending in sharp talons, and a regal stance.
A cunning, anthropomorphic Fennec Fox warrior with a slender vulpine head, oversized ears, and a lithe bipedal body built for speed.
A massive, anthropomorphic Bull warrior with a powerful horned head, a muscular torso, and bipedal legs ending in heavy hooves.
A graceful, anthropomorphic Sable Antelope warrior with a noble horned head, a sleek bipedal body, and magnificent scythe-like horns.
An agile, anthropomorphic Fallow Deer warrior with the head of a stag, broad palmate antlers, and powerful bipedal legs ending in hooves.
A resilient, anthropomorphic Hornero warrior with a clay-colored avian head, feathered arms, and slender bipedal legs.
A majestic, anthropomorphic Eagle warrior with a powerful, beaked head, broad wings integrated into its arms, and formidable gripping talons.
A muscular, anthropomorphic Kangaroo warrior with a kangaroo's head, powerful digitigrade legs built for leaping, and a long, thick balancing tail.
A dark, anthropomorphic Eagle warrior with a regal, black-feathered head, powerful wings as arms, and sharp, intimidating talons.
A swift, anthropomorphic Horse warrior with a noble equine head, a powerful bipedal torso, and legs ending in sturdy hooves.
An elegant, anthropomorphic Flamingo warrior with a slender avian head, a distinctive curved beak, and long, graceful bipedal legs.
A noble, anthropomorphic Oryx warrior with a horned antelope head, a muscular torso covered in fine white fur, and bipedal legs ending in hooves.
A ferocious, anthropomorphic Tiger warrior with a powerful feline head, a muscular bipedal body with tiger stripes, and razor-sharp claws.
A sleek, anthropomorphic Dolphin warrior with a smooth, streamlined head, a powerful bipedal body, and skin with the texture of a marine mammal.
A colossal, anthropomorphic Bison warrior with a massive, shaggy head, a powerfully built torso, and immense bipedal legs ending in hooves.
A regal, anthropomorphic Lion warrior with a noble, maned head, a powerful bipedal stance, and claws capable of shredding steel.
A sturdy, anthropomorphic Tapir warrior with a unique head featuring a prehensile snout, and a stocky, powerful bipedal frame.
A stealthy, anthropomorphic Leopard warrior with a spotted feline head, a lithe bipedal body, and silent, clawed feet.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Takin warrior with a unique moose-like head, a massively built bipedal body, and legs ending in cloven hooves.
A resilient, anthropomorphic Alpaca warrior with a gentle camelid head, a bipedal body covered in thick fleece, and a calm but sturdy stance.
A fierce, anthropomorphic Wolf warrior with a cunning wolf's head, powerful digitigrade legs, and a gaze full of pack-hunter's intelligence.
A striking, anthropomorphic Zebra warrior with a striped equine head, a powerful bipedal body covered in black and white stripes, and hoofed feet.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Jaguar warrior with a broad feline head, a stocky, muscular bipedal body with rosette patterns, and immense jaw strength.
A coastal, anthropomorphic Sea Eagle warrior with a striking, white-feathered head and chest, and powerful wings integrated into its arms.
A formidable, anthropomorphic Lion warrior with a shaggy, maned head, a powerful bipedal body, and a roar that shakes the mountains.
A magnificent, anthropomorphic Horse warrior with a noble equine head, a powerful bipedal body, and a wild, flowing mane.
A ferocious, anthropomorphic Hyena warrior with a powerful, sloping-backed bipedal stance, immense jaw strength, and a wild, unsettling gaze.
A mythic, anthropomorphic Kouprey warrior with a massive wild ox head, large horns, and a colossal, powerfully built bipedal body.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Lion warrior, a regal predator with a magnificent maned head and a muscular bipedal frame.
An industrious, anthropomorphic Beaver warrior with a stocky, powerful build, a broad flat tail used for balance, and large, sharp incisors.
A gentle, anthropomorphic Manatee warrior with a rounded aquatic mammal's head, a large, powerful bipedal body, and paddle-like hands.
A colossal, anthropomorphic Elephant warrior with a massive elephantine head, large ears, a prehensile trunk, and powerful tusks.
A nimble, anthropomorphic Goat warrior with a horned caprine head, agile digitigrade legs ending in hooves, and a resilient build.
A sturdy, anthropomorphic Andean Deer warrior with a stag's head, short powerful antlers, and a stocky, muscular bipedal body.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Panda warrior with a distinctive black-and-white bear's head, a heavy, bipedal frame, and immense physical strength.
A colossal, anthropomorphic Condor warrior with a massive vulture's head, a huge wingspan integrated into its arms, and a regal, imposing presence.
A quick, anthropomorphic Lemur warrior with a fox-like primate head, large intelligent eyes, and an agile bipedal body built for speed.
A swift, anthropomorphic Deer warrior with a graceful stag's head, slender antlers, and an alert, agile bipedal body.
A colossal, anthropomorphic Elephant warrior of immense size and wisdom, with a trunk that can be used as a weapon, and powerful tusks.
A swift, anthropomorphic Marten warrior with a slender, weasel-like head, an incredibly agile bipedal body, and sharp claws.
A vibrant, anthropomorphic Trogon warrior with a colorful avian head, feathered arms, and a plumage matching the red, white, and blue of a flag.
A rugged, anthropomorphic Mouflon warrior with a wild sheep's head, massive curling horns, and a powerful, mountain-climbing bipedal build.
A unique, anthropomorphic Lion warrior with a heraldic maned head, a powerful bipedal body, and two distinct, armored tails.
A mystical, anthropomorphic Okapi warrior with a giraffe-like head, a bipedal body, and striking zebra-like stripes on its legs.
A graceful, anthropomorphic Swan warrior with an elegant avian head, a long neck, and broad, feathered arms like powerful wings.
A tough, anthropomorphic Beira Antelope warrior with a small horned head, large ears, and a stocky, resilient bipedal desert body.
A vibrant, anthropomorphic Parrot warrior with a large, colorful avian head, a strong hooked beak, and plumage of iridescent green and purple.
A unique, anthropomorphic Palmchat warrior with a small avian head, a stocky bipedal body, and a communal, determined spirit.
A primal, anthropomorphic Crocodile warrior with a long, powerful reptilian head, a body covered in tough scaly hide, and immense jaw strength.
A high-altitude, anthropomorphic Condor warrior with a colossal avian head, a massive wingspan, and a presence as vast as the mountains.
A majestic, anthropomorphic Eagle warrior with a divine avian head, a powerful bipedal body, and a piercing gaze symbolizing authority.
A vibrant, anthropomorphic Motmot warrior with a colorful avian head, a feathered crest, and a long tail ending in two racket-like blades.
An immensely powerful, anthropomorphic Gorilla warrior with a noble primate head, a massive torso, and huge, incredibly strong arms.
A resilient, anthropomorphic Camel warrior with a stoic camel's head, a single large hump on its back, and a bipedal body built for endurance.
A fierce, anthropomorphic Wolf warrior with a northern wolf's head, a lean and powerful bipedal body, and an independent, cunning spirit.
An incredibly swift, anthropomorphic Gazelle warrior with a horned head, a slender bipedal body, and legs built for impossible speed.
A regal, anthropomorphic Lion warrior with a divine, maned head, a powerful bipedal frame, and a majestic, royal bearing.
A vibrant, anthropomorphic Iguana warrior with a crested reptilian head, a bipedal body covered in brightly colored scales, and an ancient gaze.
A colossal, anthropomorphic Bear warrior with a massive bear's head, a powerfully built torso covered in thick fur, and immense, clawed hands.
A proud, anthropomorphic Rooster warrior with a brightly colored comb on its avian head, powerful bipedal legs ending in spurs, and feathered arms.
A shadowy, anthropomorphic Panther warrior with a sleek, black-furred feline head, a powerful bipedal body, and glowing eyes.
A tenacious, anthropomorphic Hyena warrior with a powerful head, bone-crushing jaws, and a distinct, sloping bipedal posture.
A proud, anthropomorphic Wolf warrior with a mountain wolf's head, a powerful bipedal body, and an untamed, fierce spirit.
A stoic, anthropomorphic Eagle warrior with a powerful heraldic eagle's head, broad feathered arms, and formidable gripping talons.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Tawny Eagle warrior with a keen-eyed avian head, a bipedal body, and powerful wings integrated into its arms.
A wise, anthropomorphic Dolphin warrior with a sleek cetacean head, a smooth-skinned bipedal body, and an agile, intelligent presence.
A rare, anthropomorphic Dove warrior with a gentle avian head, a stout bipedal body, and a resilient, peaceful spirit.
A divine, anthropomorphic Quetzal warrior with a resplendent avian head, iridescent green feathers, and two extremely long, flowing tail plumes.
A formidable, anthropomorphic Elephant warrior with a wise elephantine head, powerful tusks, and a muscular bipedal body.
A regal, anthropomorphic Crane warrior with a graceful avian head, a magnificent crown of golden feathers, and long, elegant bipedal legs.
A powerful, anthropomorphic Jaguar warrior of supreme strength and stealth, with a broad feline head and a muscular, rosette-patterned bipedal body.
A vibrant, anthropomorphic Trogon warrior with a colorful avian head and plumage, a symbol of freedom with a proud bipedal stance.
A swift, anthropomorphic Deer warrior with an alert stag's head, graceful antlers, and an agile bipedal body built for speed.
A mythical, anthropomorphic Turul warrior with a divine falcon's head, colossal feathered wings for arms, and a body wreathed in heavenly light.
A swift, anthropomorphic Gyrfalcon warrior with an arctic falcon's head, sharp talons, and a powerful bipedal body built to withstand the cold.
A majestic, anthropomorphic Tiger warrior with a ferocious feline head, a powerful striped bipedal body, and an aura of raw power.
A primeval, anthropomorphic Komodo Dragon warrior with a massive reptilian head, a bipedal body covered in armored scales, and a venomous bite.
A royal, anthropomorphic Lion warrior with a powerful, maned head, a bipedal frame, and a presence that speaks of ancient empires.
A resilient, anthropomorphic Chukar warrior with a stout avian head, a stocky bipedal body, and a hardy, adaptable nature.
A mystical, anthropomorphic Hare warrior with a leporine head, long ears, and incredibly powerful bipedal legs built for supernatural speed.
A cunning, anthropomorphic Wolf warrior with an Apennine wolf's head, a lean and powerful bipedal body, and a wild, intelligent gaze.
